data.title: Implement figma-merge.py entry point and extend spatial-layout.schema.json with designer fields
data.description:
## What
Implement plugins/dso/scripts/figma-merge.py as the CLI entry point that orchestrates all four submodules, and extend plugins/dso/docs/contracts/spatial-layout.schema.json with the designer_added and behavioral_spec_status fields.

## testing_mode: RED — new entry point with integration behavior. Depends on all four submodule implementation tasks.

## CLI Interface
figma-merge.py --original-dir <path> --figma-spatial <path> [--output-dir <path>] [--non-interactive]
- --original-dir: directory containing spatial-layout.json, wireframe.svg, tokens.md
- --figma-spatial: path to Figma-derived spatial-layout.json (output of figma-node-mapper.py)
- --output-dir: output directory for merged artifacts (defaults to --original-dir)
- --non-interactive: skip confirmation prompt; emit warnings to stderr but proceed

## Orchestration flow
1. Load original spatial-layout.json and figma-spatial JSON
2. Call identity_match() from figma_node_mapper to get matched/unmatched components
3. Call merge_spatial() to get merged_spatial + warnings
4. If warnings (COMPLETE spec removals): display and ask confirmation (or log to stderr in --non-interactive)
5. Call merge_tokens() with merged_spatial data
6. Call generate_svg() from merged_spatial
7. Call validate_id_linkage() on all three outputs; if violations found, log and exit 1
8. Write output files to --output-dir

## Schema extension (spatial-layout.schema.json)
Add to the component definition's properties:
- designer_added: {type: boolean, description: 'True when component added by designer in Figma (not in original manifest)'}
- behavioral_spec_status: {type: string, enum: [COMPLETE, INCOMPLETE], description: 'COMPLETE when behavioral specs are fully defined; INCOMPLETE for designer-added components'}

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/figma-merge.py exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/figma-merge.py
- [ ] spatial-layout.schema.json contains designer_added and behavioral_spec_status in component properties
  Verify: python3 -c "import json; s=json.load(open('plugins/dso/docs/contracts/spatial-layout.schema.json')); comp=s['definitions']['component']['properties']; assert 'designer_added' in comp and 'behavioral_spec_status' in comp"
- [ ] python3 plugins/dso/scripts/figma-merge.py --help exits 0 with usage information
  Verify: python3 plugins/dso/scripts/figma-merge.py --help
- [ ] Integration test f921-e2d6 (FP-MERGE-1 through FP-MERGE-4 + FP-LINK tests) passes
  Verify: bash tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh 2>&1 | grep -E 'FP-MERGE-[1-4].*PASS|FP-LINK.*PASS'
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
